avail: AVAILABLE FOR PROJECTS — Q2 2026 · Guayaquil, Ecuador

hero.sub: Full-stack development with security baked in from day one. I build robust apps — then audit them so they stay that way.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: From pixel-perfect frontends to hardened backends — built right the first time.

s1.name: Frontend Development
s1.desc: SPAs, dashboards, landing pages and admin panels. Fast, accessible and pixel-perfect interfaces.

s2.name: Backend & APIs
s2.desc: REST and GraphQL APIs, microservices, authentication systems and database design at scale.

s3.name: DevOps & Cloud
s3.desc: CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerization, AWS infrastructure and Nginx/Cloudflare configuration.

s4.name: Security Audit
s4.desc: Full web application pentesting following OWASP Top 10. Detailed vulnerability report with remediation steps.

s5.name: Security Consulting
s5.desc: Security built into the dev process — not bolted on. Threat modeling, code review, hardening and AppSec training for your team.

process.title: How I Work
process.subtitle: A clear process from kickoff to production.

steps.label: Discovery
steps.desc: Scope, goals and tech requirements defined.

steps.label: Design

steps.label: Build
steps.desc: Iterative dev with weekly demos and feedback.

steps.label: Audit
steps.desc: Security review before any deploy goes live.

projects.title: Projects

cta.title: Need a Security Audit?

testimonials.title: Client Feedback
testimonials.subtitle: What people say about working with me.

t1.text: David delivered a secure, production-ready API in record time. He also flagged two security issues we hadn't noticed — incredibly valuable.
t1.author: CTO · Startup · Quito

t2.text: The security audit found critical vulnerabilities before launch. The remediation report was clear and actionable — saved us from a disaster.
t2.author: Product Manager · SaaS

t3.text: React frontend + NestJS backend delivered on schedule. Code quality and documentation made it easy for our team to take over.
t3.author: Engineering Lead · Agency
